scope.target: Deterministic version comparison and governance validation
non_goals: Use MCP graph output as evidence

steps: Add GWT tests and quick gate
execution.last_completed_step: Implemented read-only Git comparison, source/target version validation, required quick-gate integration, and ten GWT regression scenarios.

results.summary: Version comparison resolves exact refs and proposes automatic replacement only when target content is byte-identical to base; release/provenance validation fails closed in both source and target modes.
tests_run: 10/10 AI context version governance GWT tests
Real v0.1.0 to v0.2.0 read-only comparison
results.residual_risk: Byte equality is an objective safety precondition, not a semantic merge decision.
